summary: Bug fix verification complete: PKO Poker Tournament creation bug is FIXED. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Create Table, Add Bots, Leave & Refund all working correctly. 5x consecutive tournament creation test passed. Error handling for 'already in tournament' shows helpful message.

minor.issue: KeyError when deleting connection on disconnect - non-blocking but logs error

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/poker/tournaments - List available tournaments
Backend: GET /api/poker/my-tournament - Check player tournament status
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/create - Create new tournament
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/register - Register for tournament
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/add-bots - Add AI bots
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/force-start - Force start tournament
Backend: GET /api/poker/tournaments/{id} - Get tournament state
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/action - Player actions (fold/call/raise/check)
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/leave - Leave tournament during registration
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/force-leave - Force leave stuck tournaments
Backend: GET /api/poker/leaderboard - Get poker leaderboard
Backend: Bot AI makes decisions automatically
Backend: Game phase progression (pre_flop -> flop -> turn -> river)
Backend: 5x consecutive tournament creation - ALL PASSED
Backend: Error handling when already in tournament - returns 'Already in a tournament'
Frontend: Poker lobby loads at /poker
Frontend: Create Table button creates tournament and navigates to table
Frontend: Success toast 'Tournament created! Waiting for players...'
Frontend: Add Bots buttons work (+1 Bot, +3 Bots, Fill with Bots)
Frontend: Success toast 'Added 9 AI bot(s)!'
Frontend: 'You're in a Tournament' screen shows when already registered
Frontend: 'Return to Table' button navigates to tournament
Frontend: 'Leave & Refund' button leaves tournament and refunds buy-in
Frontend: Success toast 'Left tournament. Buy-in refunded!'
Frontend: Poker table displays all 10 player seats with chips/bounty
Frontend: Action buttons (Fold, Raise, All In) and bet slider present
Frontend: Tournament info panel shows Blinds, Prize Pool, Level
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: Users can now create tournaments without getting stuck
Force-leave endpoint properly clears player from tournament map
Error messages are now specific ('Already in a tournament' instead of generic 'Failed to create tournament')
Frontend properly handles error cases and shows helpful messages
Minor: WebSocket disconnect handler has KeyError when connection not in dict - should add check before delete
context_for_next_testing_agent: PKO Poker Tournament bug fix verified: 1) Tournament creation now works reliably - tested 5x consecutive creations all passed, 2) Force-leave endpoint allows users to leave stuck tournaments, 3) Error handling improved - shows 'Already in a tournament' instead of generic error, 4) Frontend Leave & Refund button works correctly, 5) All 13 backend tests pass, 6) Minor issue: WebSocket disconnect handler logs KeyError but doesn't affect functionality.
